name: Carry-Out Campers' Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Frozen apple juice concentrate (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cabbage, onion, and carrot in a large insulated ice bucket.
2. In a separate container, stir together vinegar, mustard, and vegetable oil.
3. Mix the dressing with the shredded vegetables.
4. Add the frozen apple juice concentrate.
5. Keep tightly closed until serving.
6. Stir well and season to taste before serving.
7. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
